issue.title: Heartbeat refill lane 1393: remaining Python asset sweep 3/10

commands: find src/bigclaw tests scripts bigclaw-go/scripts -type f -name '*.py' 2>/dev/null | sort

blocker.summary: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero in this workspace before BIG-GO-1393 changes.

notes: This lane documents an empty remaining Python asset inventory and hardens the Go-only state with regression coverage.
The branch baseline was already Python-free, so this lane strengthens regression coverage and refreshes validation evidence rather than removing in-branch Python files.
Baseline HEAD before lane changes was `c8e9d79c`.
The first push was rejected after `origin/main` advanced to `c71fe8ca`; the lane was then rebased and revalidated at `6bcd7118`.
A metadata closeout push was rejected after `origin/main` advanced to `f2afdaf3`; the two lane commits were replayed to `1f5924d7` and finally pushed as `5c545938`.
